imageQuality
fields.label: Image compression level
fields.description: Sets the compression level of the image (1-100). Aim to set this as low as possible without losing too much visual quality

fields.name: imageLazyLoad
fields.label: Enable lazy loading
fields.description: When enabled, the image will be loaded as the user scrolls down the page. Avoid lazy loading any images that are 'above the fold'.

fields.name: embedUrlVimeo
fields.label: Vimeo embed URL
fields.description: Video embed URL. To find this, view the video on Vimeo -> Click 'Share' -> Copy the value in the iframe's src attribute

fields.name: embedUrlYoutube
fields.label: Youtube embed URL
fields.description: Video embed URL. To find this, view the video on YouTube -> Click 'Share' -> Copy the value in the iframe's src attribute
